svg.text: PACKAGING TECHNICAL DRAWING — Luminary Box (single Cana Light, upright)
INTERNAL LAYOUT — LID OFF (top, product in place)
• CONTENTS: Cana Light luminary — straight cylinder, 100 tall
× Ø85 (Ø70 opening). Single item, stands UPRIGHT.
• CLEARANCE: ~10 mm cushion per side (fitted ring/disc cradle).
• Cube-ish box; round product, square cavity → corner voids
filled by the fitted cream insert / tissue.
• Material: rigid bone/cream gift box; lid debossed olive sprig
+ round 'CANA · GALILEE' coin seal; olive-print tissue inside.
• (REF) = confirm with factory: cradle pocket Ø (~88–90), floor
pad, board & lid thickness, exact clearances.
REFERENCE DRAWING — CONFIRM ALL DIMENSIONS WITH FACTORY
box underside · panel printed to the box footprint
• Warm-umber print on the uncoated cream underside, centred
to the box footprint (small unprinted reveal at the edge).
• Brand olive branch is the debossed Cana mark, reproduced
1:1; may also be blind-debossed in register (REF).
• Layout: wordmark · piece · verse & reference · care · web.
• Vector artwork — scalable, print-ready (see file below).
